task: Implement Vertex AI Burst Quota Cooldowns in LangGraph Stream
outcomes: Defined a `sleep` utility function returning a delayed Promise.

Hooked into the `MidpointXGraph.stream()` generator event loop inside `server.ts` to add a manual 1.5s delay `await sleep(1500)`. Because the Node stream iterates asynchronously, backpressure forces the LangGraph state machine to pause between Cognitive Node steps.
patterns_observed: When building un-throttled autonomous multi-agent systems, node transitions will instantly consume Vertex AI 'Online Prediction' Burst Quotas. Utilizing the LangGraph `for await` stream loops gracefully injects delays across Node thresholds without complex queue management.
corrections_made: Server graph execution stream loop was throttled.
